introSection: Hype is a steel launched roller coaster currently operating at Särkänniemi in Tampere, Pirkanmaa, Finland.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Hype is a Sky Rocket II from Premier Rides.

fullText:
Hype is a steel launched roller coaster currently operating at Särkänniemi in Tampere, Pirkanmaa, Finland.

Hype is a Sky Rocket II from Premier Rides.
